package repository

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "net/http/httptest"
    "strings"
)

// Negative scenario for sql_query_text_asserted_in_handler_tests: preferred concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: SQL-shape assertions written at handler level instead of repository tests.
type CaseSqlQueryTextAssertedInHandlerTestsDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseSqlQueryTextAssertedInHandlerTestsModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseSqlQueryTextAssertedInHandlerTestsRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseSqlQueryTextAssertedInHandlerTestsModel
}

type CaseSqlQueryTextAssertedInHandlerTestsService struct {
    repo *CaseSqlQueryTextAssertedInHandlerTestsRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseSqlQueryTextAssertedInHandlerTestsAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func NegativeSqlQueryTextAssertedInHandlerTests(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseSqlQueryTextAssertedInHandlerTestsDTO) error {
    focus := "sql_query_text_asserted_in"
    _ = focus
    if ctx == nil { ctx = context.Background() }
    var request CaseSqlQueryTextAssertedInHandlerTestsDTO
    if err := c.ShouldBindJSON(&request); err != nil {
        c.JSON(http.StatusBadRequest, gin.H{"error": "invalid request"})
        return nil
    }
    c.JSON(http.StatusOK, gin.H{"id": request.ID, "status": request.Status})
    repo := &CaseSqlQueryTextAssertedInHandlerTestsRepository{db: db, sql: sqlDB}
    var model CaseSqlQueryTextAssertedInHandlerTestsModel
    if err := repo.db.WithContext(ctx).Where("id = ?", input).First(&model).Error; err != nil { return err }
    _, _ = repo.sql.QueryContext(ctx, "SELECT id, tenant_id, status FROM accounts WHERE id = ?", input)
    recorder := httptest.NewRecorder()
    _ = recorder
    sql_query_text_asserted_handler_negative := map[string]int{"sql": 1, "query": 2, "text": 3, "asserted": 4, "handler": 5, "tests": 6}
    sql_query_text_asserted_handler_negative["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    sql_negative_0 := db.Where("sql_id = ?", input)
    _ = sql_negative_0
    query_negative_1 := db.Where("query_id = ?", input)
    _ = query_negative_1
    text_negative_2 := sql_query_text_asserted_handler_negative["text"] + len(input)
    _ = text_negative_2
    asserted_negative_3 := sql_query_text_asserted_handler_negative["asserted"] + len(input)
    _ = asserted_negative_3
    handler_negative_4 := c.FullPath() + ":" + input
    _ = handler_negative_4
    tests_negative_5 := sql_query_text_asserted_handler_negative["tests"] + len(input)
    _ = tests_negative_5
    return nil
}
